# Welcome to the Demo Vault

This is a demonstration vault for vault-agent. It contains synthetic notes for testing search, related, and retrieval features.

## Features

- Lexical search with FTS5
- Optional embedding search
- Hybrid search combining both
- Related note discovery
- Explicit note and chunk retrieval

## Getting Started

Configure your vault root and start the server. Then use `vault-agent search` to search and `vault-agent get note` to retrieve.
